name: ToolHive Studio
postCreateCommand: sudo chown node:node node_modules && npm install -g pnpm && pnpm install && sudo chown root:root node_modules/electron/dist/chrome-sandbox && sudo chmod 4755 node_modules/electron/dist/chrome-sandbox
postStartCommand: sudo podman system service --time=0 unix:///run/podman.sock > /tmp/podman-service.log 2>&1 & for i in $(seq 1 50); do [ -S /run/podman.sock ] && break; sleep 0.1; done; sudo chmod 666 /run/podman.sock && sudo ln -sf /run/podman.sock /var/run/docker.sock
